title: Why Mahalunge is the Top Real Estate Investment in Pune (2026)
author: VTP Market Research
content: Mahalunge has rapidly transformed from a quiet suburb into Pune's most lucrative real estate corridor. Driven by the upcoming Pune Ring Road and the Hinjawadi-Shivajinagar Metro Line 3, capital values are projected to soar. The 200+ acre VTP Blue Waters township acts as a micro-city within this ecosystem, offering Maximum Livable Area (MLA) designs that cater perfectly to the IT demographic demanding premium rental properties.

title: Understanding MLA: The Maximum Livable Area Philosophy
author: VTP Design Team
content: When buying a luxury apartment, carpet area is often misleading. VTP Realty's proprietary Maximum Livable Area (MLA) philosophy ensures zero space wastage. By eliminating long corridors and optimizing room layouts, buyers get larger rooms and expansive balconies within the same square footage compared to legacy designs. This translates directly into higher living standards and better resale value.
